[2018-12-13 20:01] spiritfryer (Spyrfyr): ```People thought that if you buy drone and forcefield the forcefield only costs 3g because the drone mines once.```
It does cost 3g
[2018-12-13 20:02] Deleted User (Deleted User): the idea is the drone doing things is irrelevant
[2018-12-13 20:02] spiritfryer (Spyrfyr): If you have 3g, (and Drone supply and 1 Energy this turn and Forcefield supply), then you can buy a Forcefield next turn by buying a Drone this turn
[2018-12-13 20:03] spiritfryer (Spyrfyr): So idk how it costs more than 3g
[2018-12-13 20:03] mrguy888: Well, go into analysis mode, look at your gold next turn, then buy forcefield and drone, and then look at your gold next turn.
[2018-12-13 20:03] mrguy888: If you have 3g you can't even buy forcefield.
[2018-12-13 20:03] spiritfryer (Spyrfyr): I have an empty board
[2018-12-13 20:03] mrguy888: So you don't get it but you agree that it is true?
[2018-12-13 20:03] spiritfryer (Spyrfyr): And I magically have 1 energy
[2018-12-13 20:03] spiritfryer (Spyrfyr): Then I can buy a Drone this turn
[2018-12-13 20:03] wilson0862 (Wilson): He means on same turn.
[2018-12-13 20:03] spiritfryer (Spyrfyr): And a forcefield next turn
[2018-12-13 20:03] mrguy888: You can buy a drone but you can't buy a forcefield.
[2018-12-13 20:04] mrguy888: Because forcefield is too expensive
[2018-12-13 20:04] wilson0862 (Wilson): Drone and f on same turn.
[2018-12-13 20:04] spiritfryer (Spyrfyr): So you mean Drone+Forcefield train
[2018-12-13 20:04] spiritfryer (Spyrfyr): Not a single Forcefield
[2018-12-13 20:04] mrguy888: Forcefield costs 1g and a drone.
[2018-12-13 20:04] spiritfryer (Spyrfyr): A single forcefield costs 3g
[2018-12-13 20:04] spiritfryer (Spyrfyr): If I buy a Drone for it this turn
[2018-12-13 20:04] spiritfryer (Spyrfyr): And I forcefield the Drone
[2018-12-13 20:04] mrguy888: Spirit, start with 3 drones and no gold.
[2018-12-13 20:05] mrguy888: Buy a forcefield and a drone on that turn.
[2018-12-13 20:05] mrguy888: You can't because it costs too much.
[2018-12-13 20:05] mrguy888: If you had 4 gold you could do it.
[2018-12-13 20:05] spiritfryer (Spyrfyr): With 3 Drones, 1 Engineer, 1 Conduit you can execute the following train:
D, DF, DF, ...
[2018-12-13 20:05] wilson0862 (Wilson): Because congratulations, you have 4 drones
[2018-12-13 20:06] mrguy888: If you have 3 gold per turn you cannot make forcefield every turn
[2018-12-13 20:06] mrguy888: If you have 3 gold per turn you can get 4 gold per turn
[2018-12-13 20:06] mrguy888: And if you have 4 gold per turn you can buy forcefield per turn
[2018-12-13 20:06] spiritfryer (Spyrfyr): Yes it costs 4 gold, but the Drone costs 2 over 2 turns
[2018-12-13 20:06] mrguy888: Yes it costs 4 gold.
[2018-12-13 20:06] mrguy888: That is what I said.
[2018-12-13 20:06] wilson0862 (Wilson): I think SF is confused because he does not make this mistake
[2018-12-13 20:06] spiritfryer (Spyrfyr): So I only need 3 gold to get the train started
[2018-12-13 20:07] mrguy888: You only need 3 gold to eventually buy lucina
[2018-12-13 20:07] spiritfryer (Spyrfyr): 3 gold per turn that is
[2018-12-13 20:07] spiritfryer (Spyrfyr): The price tag is 4 gold
[2018-12-13 20:07] wilson0862 (Wilson): Like he's already understood the mistake is dumb so just completely glossed over it because duh
[2018-12-13 20:07] spiritfryer (Spyrfyr): But the process generates a gold
[2018-12-13 20:07] spiritfryer (Spyrfyr): So I just say it costs 3 gold
[2018-12-13 20:08] spiritfryer (Spyrfyr): Because if I have predetermined that I buy a Drone solely to forcefield it
[2018-12-13 20:08] spiritfryer (Spyrfyr): Then I consider the whole thing a package
[2018-12-13 20:08] mrguy888: But forcefield is 2 prompt hp.
[2018-12-13 20:08] mrguy888: Your situation doesn't make 2 prompt hp
[2018-12-13 20:08] mrguy888: therefore it is not forcefield.
[2018-12-13 20:09] spiritfryer (Spyrfyr): Yea, to execute the train with 3 gold per turn econ, it won't be prompt
[2018-12-13 20:09] wilson0862 (Wilson): lol you're both not even talking about the same thing at all.
[2018-12-13 20:09] spiritfryer (Spyrfyr): But the Forcefield unit still cost 3 gold per turn to end up making
[2018-12-13 20:09] mrguy888: To execute lucina you need 3 gold per turn
